headline: Bezos Slams Biden Over Inflation Tweet, Says Disinformation Board Should Fact Check President's Tweet
summary:
Amazon.com, Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) Executive Chairman Jeff Bezos on Friday attacked President Joe Biden for his recent tweet on inflation and corporate taxation. 

On Friday, Biden tweeted about curtailing inflation by taxing large corporations in the U.S.
